summary: Iteration 23 - Scoring v3 (5 axes) + Scan DC 10MW + S3REnR Extended Regions. Backend: 8/8 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features verified after bug fix. Fixed setFilteredParcels → setFranceParcels bug in handleScanDC10MW function.
passed_tests: GET /api/scan/dc-10mw?region=PACA returns candidates with score, ttm_months, mw_dispo
GET /api/scan/dc-10mw?region=AuRA returns candidates (tests new AuRA S3REnR data)
GET /api/s3renr/summary returns data for OCC, AuRA, GES, NAQ regions
POST /api/chat with 'Parcelles à Fos-sur-Mer' returns parcel_results with ttm_months in score
Scoring v3 structure verified: 5 axes (distance_rte/35, mw_disponibles/25, plu/20, surface/10, raccordement_speed/10)
SCAN DC 10MW button visible in header bar
EmptyStatePanel shows Scan Automatique section with region buttons (PACA, HdF, AuRA, OCC, GES)
Clicking PACA scan button triggers loading and shows 10+ results
Score breakdown shows 5 bars (Distance RTE /35, MW dispo /25, PLU /20, Surface /10, Raccordement /10)
TTM (délai raccordement) displayed in parcel detail (~12 mois for Fos-sur-Mer)
Scan results display with scores (88/100 for Fos-sur-Mer parcel)
seed_data_creation: Used existing test user 'test_user_01' with session for UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 23 verified Scoring v3 + Scan DC 10MW + S3REnR extended regions. Key changes: 1) Scoring v3 with 5 axes: distance_rte/35, mw_disponibles/25, plu/20, surface/10, raccordement_speed/10 + malus. 2) ttm_months returned in score dict. 3) GET /api/scan/dc-10mw endpoint scans postes with >=10 MW dispo and returns scored parcels. 4) S3REnR extended to 8 regions: IDF, PACA, HdF, OCC, AuRA, GES, NAQ. 5) Fixed bug in Dashboard.js: setFilteredParcels was undefined, changed to setFranceParcels. All APIs are live (no mocked APIs).

bug_fixed.fix: Changed setFilteredParcels to setFranceParcels in handleScanDC10MW function
bug_fixed.root_cause: Variable name mismatch - filteredParcels was renamed to franceParcels but handleScanDC10MW still used old name

axes.distance_rte: 0-35 pts based on distance to HTB poste
axes.mw_disponibles: 0-25 pts based on S3REnR MW available
axes.plu: 0-20 pts based on PLU zone compatibility
axes.surface: 0-10 pts based on parcel surface (1-2 ha ideal for 10MW)

scoring_v3_verification.ttm_months: Returned in score dict, ranges 12-48 months
scoring_v3_verification.malus: Applied for PPRI, seismic zone, saturated network, DRAC archaeology

mocked_api_note: No mocked APIs - All data is real from OSM/Overpass, S3REnR, and IGN API Carto
